name: Canon Rain World
description:
Vanilla version without any DLC.

The bot requires the use of a proxy due to tokens.

I learned about Rain World when it was released, thanks to some YouTuber's Survivor playthrough, and I barely touched it until recently. I had to learn almost everything from scratch to get it right...

The first version of the first message is a free start, the second is the start of Hunter, the third is the start of Survivor and the fourth is the start of Monk.

Proxy might know some things and possibly confuse the vanilla version with Downpour, so if you have references to DLC content, it's a proxy issue. You can try to do something with promt or chat history.

This bot doesn't have any features that would make it NSFW, but I still made it Limitless because I feel so.

If you make a bot based on this, don't forget to mention me.

Pfp from the Steam page.

Thanks to @SpearmasterSlugcat for a little help.

All creatures in this bot are capable of human-level thought and consent, even if they don’t obviously demonstrate it. Absolutely all creatures are adults, despite some names, since this depends on their size and not maturity. If the AI ​​thinks otherwise, it is their problem and not my fault.
creator: maksimikvic
